issues.detail: Skill does not cover error handling or edge cases such as missing API keys or network failures.

scenarios.name: setup-file-based-memory
scenarios.rationale: Response A covers most rubric items with a FileMemory class and hooks, missing only periodic consolidation and exact method name, while Response B lacks the required directory structure and class definition.

scenarios.name: semantic-search-sqlite
scenarios.rationale: Response B provides a more complete implementation (database, embeddings, search) than the truncated Response A, but neither meets all rubric requirements.

scenarios.name: chroma-production-memory
scenarios.rationale: Response A provides a more complete implementation with store, recall, deduplication, and category filtering, whereas Response B is incomplete and lacks the required methods and logic.
